quoted_text:
Electric Vehicles and the Displacement of Oil Consumption

The global deployment of electric vehicles is starting to displace a small but significant amount of oil consumption and the impact is expected to become much more significant by the middle of the next decade. Electric vehicles displaced about 1.7 million barrels per day (b/d) of oil consumption in 2025 up from 0.4 million b/d in 2020, according to the International Energy Agency. Displacement is expected to increase more than five-fold
